content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

A shopkeeper gives two successive discounts of 20 % and 10 % on surplus stock. Further, he also gives a 5 % extra discount on cash payments. If a person buys a shirt from the surplus stock and pays in cash, what overall discount percent will he get on the shirt? 

Solution: Let the marked price of the shirt be Rs. 1000 
Pric

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

e after first discount = Rs. 1000 - 20 % of Rs. 1000 = Rs. 1000 - 200 = Rs. 800
Price after second discount = Rs. 800 - 10 % of Rs. 800 = Rs. 800 - 80 = Rs. 720 
Price after cash discount = Rs. 720 - 5 % of Rs. 720 = Rs. 720 - 36 = Rs. 684 
Therefore, total discount = Rs. 1000 - 684 = Rs. 316
Overall discount percent = (316 / 1000) x 100 = 31.60 %
